particulars.description: By way of first legal mortgage, all estates or interests in any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property now owned by it; all present and future estates or interests of the company in, or over, any freehold, leasehold or commonhold property; all its present and future goodwill; all its uncalled capital; and all the intellectual property.

persons_entitled.name: Barry Devlin, Ruth Devlin and Alan Harman (Together the Security Trustees)

particulars.description: Fixed and floating charges over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts uncalled capital buildings fixtures fixed plant and machinery.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

persons_entitled.name: The Governor and Company of the Bank of Scotland
